texto: Two human beings anchored to one another are like two ships shaken by waves
autor: their carcases collide with one another and creak.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a their carcases collide with one another and creak.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Two human beings anchored to one another are like two ships shaken by waves” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, andre-maurois, climats pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de climats.
